attributesRaw.name: 0000_country_specific
attributesRaw.value: AT, BA, BE, BG, CZ, DE, DK, EE, FI, FO, FR, HR, HU, IS, LT, LU, LV, NL, NO, PL, RO, SE, SI, SK

value.en: OPGW conductors combine the functions of grounding and high-speed data transmission in overhead power lines. Installed in the top position of transmission towers, they provide lightning protection while housing optical fibers for communication and grid monitoring. Ideal for high-voltage networks where both electrical performance and real-time data connectivity are required.
value.pt: Os condutores OPGW conjugam as funções de ligação à terra e de transmissão de dados em alta velocidade em linhas elétricas de transmissão aéreas. Instalados no topo das torres de transmissão, oferecem proteção contra descargas atmosféricas, e ao mesmo tempo, albergam fibras ópticas para a comunicação e a monitorização da rede. São ideais para redes de alta tensão onde são exigidos, em simultâneo, desempenho elétrico e transmissão de dados em tempo real.

descriptionAllLocales.value: Stranded type stainless steel tube design, no grease
Construção com tubo de aço inoxidável, sem massa lubrificante

value.en: Aerial Bundled Cables (ABC) designed for low-voltage overhead distribution networks in urban, suburban, and rural areas. Commonly used for supplying power to remote facilities and settlements of both temporary and permanent nature, as well as for overhead house connections. These cables are suitable for mounting on poles, support brackets, and various constructions made of wood, iron, or other materials.

attributesRaw.name: 0000_country_specific
attributesRaw.value: AT, BA, BG, CZ, DE, EE, HR, HU, LT, LV, PL, RO, SI, SK

value.cs: Instalace tohoto  výrobku smí  provádět  pouze osoby  s elektrotechnickou kvalifikací. Výrobek je  vyvinut podle platných norem.  Instalace  musí  být provedena v souladu s právě  platnými předpisy.
value.de: Die Verarbeitung dieses Produkts darf nur durch eine Elektrofachkraft erfolgen. Das Produkt wurde entsprechend anerkannter Normen entwickelt. Es sind die jeweils gültigen Installationsvorschriften anzuwenden.
value.en: Installation of the product should only be carried out by personnel trained and qualified for electrical works. The product is designed according to recognized standards. Applicable rules of installation must be applied at all times.
value.pl: Niniejsze wyroby mogą być instalowane wyłącznie przez osoby posiadające niezbędne wykształcenie i uprawnienia w zakresie prac elektroinstalacyjnych. Konstrukcja tych wyrobów jest zgodna ze wskazanymi normami przedmiotowymi. W trakcie prac instalacyjnych wymagane jest stosowanie się do obowiązujących przepisów w tym zakresie.

value.cs: Kabely jsou určeny pro pevné uložení ve vnitřních a venkovních prostorách, v zemi, v betonu.
value.de: Die Kabel sind für die feste Verlegung in Innenräumen, im Freien, in Erde und in Beton geeignet.
value.en: Cables are designed for fixed installation, indoors and outdoors, in the ground and in concrete.
value.pl: Kable przeznaczone do układania na stałe, wewnątrz oraz na zewnątrz pomieszczeń, bezpośrednio w gruncie oraz betonie.

value.da: Produktet må kun installeres af en autoriseret elinstallatør. Produktet er udviklet i henhold til gældende standarder. Gældende regler for installation skal til enhver tid anvendes.
value.en: Installation of the product should only be carried out by personnel trained and qualified for electrical works. The product is designed according to recognized standards. Applicable rules of installation must be applied at all times.

value.da: NOIKLX 90 Dca er registreret i databasen for byggeprodukter, som kan anvendes i Svanemærket byggeri. Let installationskabel til fast installation, hvor der stilles krav til anvendelse af et miljørigtigt halogenfrit kabel. Til installation i tørre og våde rum, udendørs i fri luft eller i jorden. Kan indmures og indstøbes direkte. Uegnet til indstøbning i vibreret beton. Lederisolationen er ikke egnet til direkte lyseksponering.
value.en:
Cables are designed for fixed installation where halogen-free and environmentally friendly cables are required, in dry and wet rooms and outside as well as in the open air. Can be laid in the ground. May be bricked in and embedded directly. Not suitable for embedment in vibrated concrete. Conductor insulation must be protected against light exposure.
NOIKLX 90 Dca is registered in the Building Materials Database and can be included in a Nordic Swan Ecolabelled building.

value.da: Produktet må kun installeres af en autoriseret elinstallatør. Produktet er udviklet i henhold til gældende standarder. Gældende regler for installation skal til enhver tid anvendes.
value.en: Installation of the product should only be carried out by personnel trained and qualified for electrical works. The product is designed according to recognized standards. Applicable rules of installation must be applied at all times.

value.da: NOIKLX 90 Dca er registreret i databasen for byggeprodukter, som kan anvendes i Svanemærket byggeri. Let installationskabel til fast installation, hvor der stilles krav til anvendelse af et miljørigtigt halogenfrit kabel. Til installation i tørre og våde rum, udendørs i fri luft eller i jorden. Kan indmures og indstøbes direkte. Uegnet til indstøbning i vibreret beton. Lederisolationen er ikke egnet til direkte lyseksponering.
value.en:
Cables are designed for fixed installation where halogen-free and environmentally friendly cables are required, in dry and wet rooms and outside as well as in the open air. Can be laid in the ground. May be bricked in and embedded directly. Not suitable for embedment in vibrated concrete. Conductor insulation must be protected against light exposure.
NOIKLX 90 Dca is registered in the Building Materials Database and can be included in a Nordic Swan Ecolabelled building.

Designed for medium-voltage overhead distribution networks, offering increased safety and reliability in areas with vegetation, pollution, or high lightning exposure. They feature an anti-tracking outer sheath, providing enhanced protection against electrical discharges, surface tracking, and environmental degradation.
These conductors are ideal for installations in forested, rural, or urban areas where improved phase-to-phase insulation and reduced risk of outages are critical. They are often used to upgrade bare conductor lines without fully transitioning to underground systems.
value.pt:
Concebidos para as redes aéreas de distribuição de média tensão, estes cabos oferecem maior segurança e fiabilidade em zonas com vegetação, poluição ou com elevada incidência de descargas atmosféricas. Possuem uma bainha exterior anti-tracking, que proporciona uma maior proteção contra descargas elétricas, correntes rastejantes (tracking) e degradação ambiental. 
Estes condutores são ideais para instalação em zonas florestais, rurais ou urbanas, onde uma melhor isolação entre fases e um risco reduzido de interrupções são fundamentais. São frequentemente utilizados para a modernização de linhas com condutores nus sem a necessidade de migrar completamente para sistemas subterrâneos.

descriptionAllLocales.value: Watertight ACSR covered conductor, tracking resistant
Condutor coberto tipo ACSR estanque, resistente ao tracking

value.en:
Designed for high-voltage power transmission in critical infrastructure projects such as substations, power plants, interconnection lines, renewable energy parks, and urban grid reinforcement.
These cables are suitable for direct burial, installation in ducts, or trench systems, even in humid or water-prone environments.
value.pt: Concebidos para a transmissão de energia elétrica de alta tensão em projetos de infraestruturas, como subestações, centrais elétricas, linhas de interligação, parques de energia renovável e de reforço das redes urbanas. Estes cabos são adequados para serem diretamente enterrados no solo, ou instalados em condutas ou sistemas de valas, bem como em ambientes húmidos ou sujeitos a infiltrações.

descriptionAllLocales.value: Longitudinally and radially watertight, with copper wires metallic screen
Estanqueidade longitudinal e radial, com ecrã metálico de fios de cobre
